name: Kyiv (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the field — the heraldic colour of Kyiv since at least the 16th century
the silver figure and armour of Saint Michael

description: A square light-blue field bearing the coat of arms of Kyiv: Saint Michael the Archangel in silver and gold, with a flaming sword and a shield.
history: Kyiv is the capital and most populous city of Ukraine, holding ISO 3166-2 code UA-30 with special administrative status equal to that of the oblasts. The Archangel Michael has been the patron saint and the city symbol since at least the 16th century; the current flag depicts him in heraldic style on the historic light-blue field of the city.

features.role: Saint Michael the Archangel — coat of arms of Kyiv
